text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Mar 25 02:19:10 2014
New Revision: 349102
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349102
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349102/

Log:
  - Remove reference to lang/ruby-mode.el since it is gone
  
  PR:		ports/187895
  Submitted by:	Yasuhiro KIMURA <yasu@utahime.org>

Modified:
  head/lang/ruby19/pkg-message
  head/lang/ruby20/pkg-message
  head/lang/ruby21/pkg-message

Modified: head/lang/ruby19/pkg-message
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/ruby19/pkg-message	Tue Mar 25 00:28:13 2014	(r349101)
+++ head/lang/ruby19/pkg-message	Tue Mar 25 02:19:10 2014	(r349102)
@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ since they require extra dependencies:
 	databases/ruby-gdbm:	GDBM module
 	x11-toolkits/ruby-tk:	Tcl/Tk modules
 	japanese/ruby-tk:	Tcl/Tk modules for Japanized Tcl/Tk
-	lang/ruby-mode.el:	Emacs lisp modules
 
 Install them as occasion demands.
 ====

 Install them as occasion demands.
